description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI - Release that triggers on workflow dispatch with an optional commit or tag input and on push to release/* branches when VERSION or tags v* change. The workflow has three jobs: release-version, release-to-ecr, and release-to-dockerhub. The release-version job checks out a specified commit or tag, extracts version information from VERSION, and outputs a version string. The release-to-ecr and release-to-dockerhub jobs depend on release-version, use reusable workflows to build and push Docker images to ECR and DockerHub respectively, using the version string from release-version.
